title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - L&T Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, L&T Finance in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
